title: Everybody (Backstreet's Back)
why_this_song: Question drill: 'Am I original? Yeah. Am I the only one? Yeah.' — A1/A2 students practice yes/no questions with 'to be'.
grammar_callouts: yes/no questions with 'to be': Am I X?

lines: Oh, my God, we're back again

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.excerpt: Oh, my God, we're back again
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Backstreet Boys one question about "Everybody (Backstreet's Back)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Backstreet Boys sobre "Everybody (Backstreet's Back)", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everybody" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everybody" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** The 'Am I X? Yeah.' call-response is perfect for practicing question intonation. Classroom-friendly (skip the sexual line with younger students).
